videos.video_subject: Erling Haaland eats an extreme diet of raw heart, liver and bone marrow and over six thousand calories a day to become an unstoppable scoring machine
videos.video_script: Erling Haaland eats things that would make most people feel sick. His diet includes raw heart, liver, and bone marrow nearly every single week. He drinks water and milk filtered through a special machine and eats over six thousand calories a day. His own father feeds him the cuts of meat most people throw straight in the bin. People call it disgusting, but Haaland just calls it pure fuel. That is exactly how he became an unstoppable scoring machine. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Erling Haaland Manchester City goal celebration, Erling Haaland sky blue City jersey, Erling Haaland meditation celebration, Erling Haaland screaming celebration close up, Erling Haaland Norway red jersey, Erling Haaland gym training, Erling Haaland muscles physique, Erling Haaland close up face, Erling Haaland scoring goal, Erling Haaland celebration arms out
